nasb.text: Then I came to the governors of the provinces beyond the River and gave them the king’s letters. Now the king had sent with me officers of the army and horsemen.

esv.text: Then I came to the governors of the province Beyond the River and gave them the king’s letters. Now the king had sent with me officers of the army and horsemen.

cnv.text: 於是我到了河西那邊的省長那裡去，把王的詔書交給他們；王又派了軍長和馬兵護送我。

ccb.text: 王派将领率骑兵沿途护送我。到了河西省长那里，我把王的诏书交给他们。
